release_contacts.description: Unified contacts list, segments and profile drawer (Contacts CRM v1).

release_data_store.description: Datasets, models and dynamic data bindings.

release_community.description: Community browsing, publishing and plugin installs.

release_commerce_v2.description: Commerce v2 wave: catalog, cart/checkout, digital goods, reservations, POS, repriced tiers (AGL-276..331).

release_inbox.description: Form submissions, site members, and the lead inbox.

release_logic.description: Variables, no-code functions, and reference health.

version.description: Release flags seed (AGL-231): one JSON parameter per release-gated console feature; managed in the staff admin Feature Flags page thereafter.
